hooks.command: cd '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina/mcp_agent_mail' && uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations active '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina'
cd '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina/mcp_agent_mail' && uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli acks pending '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina' 'YOUR_AGENT_NAME' --limit 20
cd '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina/mcp_agent_mail' && uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations soon '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina' --minutes 10
cd '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina/mcp_agent_mail' && uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli list-acks --project '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina' --agent 'YOUR_AGENT_NAME' --limit 10
cd '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina/mcp_agent_mail' && uv run python -m mcp_agent_mail.cli file_reservations list '/Users/bone/dev/games/patina'
